utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) – fully specified; travel_dates (May 15–19, 2024) – fully specified; transportation (flight details with airline, dates, and cost) – fully specified; accommodation (hotel with name, rating, details, and cost) – fully specified; activities (3 activities with names and costs) – fully specified; additional_services (insurance verification with cost info) – included and specified; total_budget (€1,505 with taxes) – fully specified. All 7 items are present with the required details. Even though the user mentioned restaurants in their request, the required format does not require a separate 'restaurants' item, so it is not counted.
